content.problemStatement:
You are given two sets of segments on a line, AAA and BBB. Set AAA contains NNN segments (numbered 111 through NNN); for each valid iii, the iii-th of these segments is SA,i=[LA,i,RA,i]S_{A,i} = [L_{A,i}, R_{A,i}]SA,iŌĆŗ=[LA,iŌĆŗ,RA,iŌĆŗ]. Set BBB contains MMM segments (numbered 111 through MMM); for each valid iii, the iii-th of these segments is SB,i=[LB,i,RB,i]S_{B,i} = [L_{B,i}, R_{B,i}]SB,iŌĆŗ=[LB,iŌĆŗ,RB,iŌĆŗ].

Find Ōłæi=1NŌłæj=1MŌłŻSA,iŌł®SB,jŌłŻ\sum_{i=1}^N \sum_{j=1}^M |S_{A,i} \cap S_{B,j}|Ōłæi=1NŌĆŗŌłæj=1MŌĆŗŌłŻSA,iŌĆŗŌł®SB,jŌĆŗŌłŻ, where ŌłŻSA,iŌł®SB,jŌłŻ|S_{A,i} \cap S_{B,j}|ŌłŻSA,iŌĆŗŌł®SB,jŌĆŗŌłŻ denotes the length of the intersection of the iii-th segment from set AAA and the jjj-th segment from set BBB. Note that the length of a segment [l,r][l, r][l,r] is rŌłÆlr-lrŌłÆl.
constraints: 1ŌēżLA,i<RA,iŌēż1081 \leq L_{A,i} \lt R_{A,i} \leq 10^81ŌēżLA,iŌĆŗ<RA,iŌĆŗŌēż108 for each valid iii
1ŌēżLB,i<RB,iŌēż1081 \leq L_{B,i} \lt R_{B,i} \leq 10^81ŌēżLB,iŌĆŗ<RB,iŌĆŗŌēż108 for each valid iii
the sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 2Ōŗģ1052 \cdot 10^52Ōŗģ105
the sum of MMM over all test cases does not exceed 2Ōŗģ1052 \cdot 10^52Ōŗģ105

`Explanation**Example case 1:** The intersection of SA,1S_{A,1}SA,1ŌĆŗ and SB,1S_{B,1}SB,1ŌĆŗ is the segment [1,2][1, 2][1,2]. The intersection of SA,2S_{A,2}SA,2ŌĆŗ and SB,2S_{B,2}SB,2ŌĆŗ is [3,4][3, 4][3,4]. Both remaining intersections have lengths 000, so the sum is 1+1=21 + 1 = 21+1=2.
**Example case 2:** The only two segments have an empty intersection, which has length 000.
**Example case 3:** The segment [5,8][5, 8][5,8] is covered by both sets of segments, so the sum is 333.
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and MMM.
NNN lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers LA,iL_{A,i}LA,iŌĆŗ and RA,iR_{A,i}RA,iŌĆŗ.
MMM more lines follow. For each valid iii, the iii-th of these lines contains two space-separated integers LB,iL_{B,i}LB,iŌĆŗ and RB,iR_{B,i}RB,iŌĆŗ.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print a single line containing one integer ŌĆĢ the value of the sum.
